scenarios.name: tool_only
scenarios.description: Single tool call (weather) with structured response (no LLM).
scenarios.message: What is the weather in Paris right now?

scenarios.name: rag_only
scenarios.description: Knowledge retrieval for travel tips using RAG documents.
scenarios.message: What are the essential items to pack for a winter trip to Islamabad?

scenarios.name: rag_plus_tool
scenarios.description: Combined RAG retrieval + tool call (e.g. food recommendations + weather).
scenarios.message: Tell me about the food in Tokyo and what the weather is like today.

scenarios.name: full_pipeline
scenarios.description: Full itinerary request triggering RAG, tools, and narrative LLM generation.
scenarios.message: Plan a detailed 3-day itinerary for Istanbul including flights, hotels, and budget.
